# 自动识别分隔符
detect_delim <- function(file_path) {
  first_line <- readLines(file_path, n = 1, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  if (length(first_line) == 0) stop("Empty file: ", file_path)
  n_tab <- stringr::str_count(first_line, "\t")
  n_comma <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ",")
  n_semicolon <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ";")
  delims <- c("\t" = n_tab, "," = n_comma, ";" = n_semicolon)
  names(which.max(delims))
}

read_header <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    n_max = 0,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  ) |> names()
}

read_table_auto <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    na = c("", "NA", "NaN", "NULL"),
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  )
}

assert_has_cols <- function(df, cols, df_name) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("[%s] missing required columns: %s", df_name, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
}

as_logical_flex <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")  ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n")  ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

map_final_type <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("主导单谱系型", "Dominant single-lineage", "dominant single-lineage") ~ "Dominant single-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("稳定多谱系型", "Stable multi-lineage", "stable multi-lineage")       ~ "Stable multi-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("未定型", "Undetermined", "undetermined")                             ~ "Undetermined",
    TRUE ~ x_chr
  )
}

normalize_taxon_name <- function(x) {
  x |>
    as.character() |>
    stringr::str_trim() |>
    stringr::str_to_lower() |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("\\s+", " ")
}

support_status_std <- function(x) {

}

# 如果 marker 列不存在，则按文件来源补
add_marker_if_missing <- function(df, marker_value) {
  if ("marker" %in% names(df)) {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = dplyr::if_else(is.na(marker) | marker == "", marker_value, as.character(marker)))
  } else {

  }
}

    )
  })
}

run_nonparam_stats <- function(df, value_col, group_col, panel_name) {
  x <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(.data[[group_col]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(.group = as.character(.data[[group_col]]))

  group_n <- x |>
    dplyr::count(.group, name = "n")

  # 少于两个有效组时，返回空统计框架
  if (nrow(group_n) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "INSUFFICIENT_GROUPS",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  kw_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = as.numeric(kw$statistic),
      p = as.numeric(kw$p.value),
      p_adj = as.numeric(kw$p.value)
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dunn_tbl <- tryCatch({
    dunn_raw <- FSA::dunnTest(
      stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)),
      data = x,
      method = "bh"
    )$res

    dunn_raw |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        group1 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 1],
        group2 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 2]
      ) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group1" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n1 = n) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group2" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n2 = n) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        panel = panel_name,
        test = "Dunn",
        group1,
        group2,
        n1,
        n2,
        statistic = Z,
        p = P.unadj,
        p_adj = P.adj
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Dunn_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  eff_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    k <- dplyr::n_distinct(x[[group_col]])
    n <- nrow(x)
    eps2 <- ifelse(n > k, (as.numeric(kw$statistic) - k + 1) / (n - k), NA_real_)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = n,
      n2 = k,
      statistic = eps2,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(kw_row, dunn_tbl, eff_row)
}

# secondary candidate 表的可选列兜底：

ensure_secondary_optional_cols <- function(df) {

detect_delim <- function(file_path) {
  first_line <- readLines(file_path, n = 1, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  if (length(first_line) == 0) stop("Empty file: ", file_path)
  n_tab <- stringr::str_count(first_line, "\t")
  n_comma <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ",")
  n_semicolon <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ";")
  delims <- c("\t" = n_tab, "," = n_comma, ";" = n_semicolon)
  names(which.max(delims))
}

as_logical_flex <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")  ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n")  ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

map_final_type <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("主导单谱系型", "Dominant single-lineage", "dominant single-lineage") ~ "Dominant single-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("稳定多谱系型", "Stable multi-lineage", "stable multi-lineage")       ~ "Stable multi-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("未定型", "Undetermined", "undetermined")                             ~ "Undetermined",
    TRUE ~ x_chr
  )
}

run_nonparam_stats <- function(df, value_col, group_col, panel_name) {
  x <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(.data[[group_col]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(.group = as.character(.data[[group_col]]))

  group_n <- x |>
    dplyr::count(.group, name = "n")

  if (nrow(group_n) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "INSUFFICIENT_GROUPS",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  kw_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = as.numeric(kw$statistic),
      p = as.numeric(kw$p.value),
      p_adj = as.numeric(kw$p.value)
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dunn_tbl <- tryCatch({
    dunn_raw <- FSA::dunnTest(
      stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)),
      data = x,
      method = "bh"
    )$res

    dunn_raw |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        group1 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 1],
        group2 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 2]
      ) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group1" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n1 = n) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group2" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n2 = n) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        panel = panel_name,
        test = "Dunn",
        group1,
        group2,
        n1,
        n2,
        statistic = Z,
        p = P.unadj,
        p_adj = P.adj
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Dunn_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  eff_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    k <- dplyr::n_distinct(x[[group_col]])
    n <- nrow(x)
    eps2 <- ifelse(n > k, (as.numeric(kw$statistic) - k + 1) / (n - k), NA_real_)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = n,
      n2 = k,
      statistic = eps2,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(kw_row, dunn_tbl, eff_row)
}

# 自动识别分隔符
detect_delim <- function(file_path) {
  first_line <- readLines(file_path, n = 1, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  if (length(first_line) == 0) stop("Empty file: ", file_path)
  n_tab <- stringr::str_count(first_line, "\t")
  n_comma <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ",")
  n_semicolon <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ";")
  delims <- c("\t" = n_tab, "," = n_comma, ";" = n_semicolon)
  names(which.max(delims))
}

# 读取表头
read_header <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    n_max = 0,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  ) |> names()
}

# 自动读取表
read_table_auto <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    na = c("", "NA", "NaN", "NULL"),
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  )
}

# 检查必须列
assert_has_cols <- function(df, cols, df_name) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("[%s] missing required columns: %s", df_name, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
}

# 灵活布尔解析
as_logical_flex <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")  ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n")  ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

# final_type 中英文统一映射
map_final_type <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("主导单谱系型", "Dominant single-lineage", "dominant single-lineage") ~ "Dominant single-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("稳定多谱系型", "Stable multi-lineage", "stable multi-lineage")       ~ "Stable multi-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("未定型", "Undetermined", "undetermined")                             ~ "Undetermined",
    TRUE ~ x_chr
  )
}

# taxon_name 标准化
normalize_taxon_name <- function(x) {
  x |>
    as.character() |>
    stringr::str_trim() |>
    stringr::str_to_lower() |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("\\s+", " ")
}

# replicate_support_status 标准化
support_status_std <- function(x) {
  tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

# 如果 marker 缺失，则按文件来源补 marker
add_marker_if_missing <- function(df, marker_value) {
  if ("marker" %in% names(df)) {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = dplyr::if_else(is.na(marker) | marker == "", marker_value, as.character(marker)))
  } else {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = marker_value)
  }
}

# secondary candidate 表的可选列兜底
# 如果没有 retained_flag，默认视为 TRUE
# 如果没有 replicate_support_status，默认视为 supported
ensure_secondary_optional_cols <- function(df) {
  if (!"retained_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df |> dplyr::mutate(retained_flag = TRUE)
  }
  if (!"replicate_support_status" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df |> dplyr::mutate(replicate_support_status = "supported")
  }
  df
}

# 统一主题
theme_pub <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(color = "black"),
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey90"),
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70"),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

# 保存可编辑矢量 PDF
save_pdf <- function(plot_obj, file_path, width = 7, height = 5) {
  tryCatch({
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      device = grDevices::cairo_pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in"
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("cairo_pdf failed, fallback to pdf(): ", conditionMessage(e))
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      device = grDevices::pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      useDingbats = FALSE
    )
  })
}

# 统计函数：Kruskal + Dunn(BH)
run_nonparam_stats <- function(df, value_col, group_col, panel_name) {
  x <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(.data[[group_col]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(.group = as.character(.data[[group_col]]))

  group_n <- x |>
    dplyr::count(.group, name = "n")

  if (nrow(group_n) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "INSUFFICIENT_GROUPS",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  kw_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = as.numeric(kw$statistic),
      p = as.numeric(kw$p.value),
      p_adj = as.numeric(kw$p.value)
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dunn_tbl <- tryCatch({
    dunn_raw <- FSA::dunnTest(
      stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)),
      data = x,
      method = "bh"
    )$res

    dunn_raw |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        group1 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 1],
        group2 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 2]
      ) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group1" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n1 = n) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group2" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n2 = n) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        panel = panel_name,
        test = "Dunn",
        group1,
        group2,
        n1,
        n2,
        statistic = Z,
        p = P.unadj,
        p_adj = P.adj
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Dunn_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  eff_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    k <- dplyr::n_distinct(x[[group_col]])
    n <- nrow(x)
    eps2 <- ifelse(n > k, (as.numeric(kw$statistic) - k + 1) / (n - k), NA_real_)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = n,
      n2 = k,
      statistic = eps2,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(kw_row, dunn_tbl, eff_row)
}

required_cols <- list(
  "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS1.tsv" = c("sample_id", "taxon_rank", "taxon_name"),
  "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS2.tsv" = c("sample_id", "taxon_rank", "taxon_name"),
  "ITS1_clean_lineages.tsv"              = c("sample_id", "taxon_rank", "taxon_name", "clean_reads"),
  "ITS2_clean_lineages.tsv"              = c("sample_id", "taxon_rank", "taxon_name", "clean_reads"),
  "sample_type_call.tsv"                 = c("sample_id", "final_type")
)

audit_rows <- list()
loaded <- list()

for (fn in required_files) {
  fpath <- file.path(input_dir, fn)
  exists <- file.exists(fpath)
  delim <- if (exists) detect_delim(fpath) else NA_character_
  header <- if (exists) paste(read_header(fpath, delim), collapse = "|") else NA_character_

  audit_rows[[fn]] <- tibble::tibble(
    file_name = fn,
    file_path = fpath,
    exists = exists,
    detected_delimiter = delim,
    header_columns = header
  )

  if (!exists) {
    stop("Required input file not found: ", fpath)
  }

  dat <- read_table_auto(fpath, delim)
  miss <- setdiff(required_cols[[fn]], names(dat))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Input file [%s] missing required columns: %s", fn, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  loaded[[fn]] <- dat
}

detect_delim <- function(file_path) {
  first_line <- readLines(file_path, n = 1, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  if (length(first_line) == 0) stop("Empty file: ", file_path)
  n_tab <- stringr::str_count(first_line, "\t")
  n_comma <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ",")
  n_semicolon <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ";")
  delims <- c("\t" = n_tab, "," = n_comma, ";" = n_semicolon)
  names(which.max(delims))
}

read_header <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    n_max = 0,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  ) |> names()
}

read_table_auto <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    na = c("", "NA", "NaN", "NULL"),
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  )
}

assert_has_cols <- function(df, cols, df_name) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("[%s] missing required columns: %s", df_name, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
}

as_logical_flex <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")  ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n")  ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

map_final_type <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("主导单谱系型", "Dominant single-lineage", "dominant single-lineage") ~ "Dominant single-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("稳定多谱系型", "Stable multi-lineage", "stable multi-lineage")       ~ "Stable multi-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("未定型", "Undetermined", "undetermined")                             ~ "Undetermined",
    TRUE ~ x_chr
  )
}

normalize_taxon_name <- function(x) {
  x |>
    as.character() |>
    stringr::str_trim() |>
    stringr::str_to_lower() |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("\\s+", " ")
}

support_status_std <- function(x) {
  tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

add_marker_if_missing <- function(df, marker_value) {
  if ("marker" %in% names(df)) {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = dplyr::if_else(is.na(marker) | marker == "", marker_value, as.character(marker)))
  } else {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = marker_value)
  }
}

ensure_secondary_optional_cols <- function(df) {
  if (!"retained_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df |> dplyr::mutate(retained_flag = TRUE)
  }
  if (!"replicate_support_status" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df |> dplyr::mutate(replicate_support_status = "supported")
  }
  df
}

# 安全取列：列不存在时返回 NA 向量
pick_or_na_integer <- function(df, col_name) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    as.integer(df[[col_name]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_integer_, nrow(df))
  }
}

pick_or_na_numeric <- function(df, col_name) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    as.numeric(df[[col_name]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  }
}

safe_row_n_available <- function(df, cols) {
  cols2 <- intersect(cols, names(df))
  if (length(cols2) == 0) {
    rep(0L, nrow(df))
  } else {
    rowSums(!is.na(df[, cols2, drop = FALSE]))
  }
}

safe_row_means <- function(df, cols) {
  cols2 <- intersect(cols, names(df))
  if (length(cols2) == 0) {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  } else {
    rowMeans(as.data.frame(df[, cols2, drop = FALSE]), na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

theme_pub <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +

      strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70"),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

save_pdf <- function(plot_obj, file_path, width = 7, height = 5) {
  tryCatch({
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      device = grDevices::cairo_pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in"
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("cairo_pdf failed, fallback to pdf(): ", conditionMessage(e))
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      device = grDevices::pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      useDingbats = FALSE
    )
  })
}

run_nonparam_stats <- function(df, value_col, group_col, panel_name) {
  x <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(.data[[group_col]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(.group = as.character(.data[[group_col]]))

  group_n <- x |>
    dplyr::count(.group, name = "n")

  if (nrow(group_n) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "INSUFFICIENT_GROUPS",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  kw_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = as.numeric(kw$statistic),
      p = as.numeric(kw$p.value),
      p_adj = as.numeric(kw$p.value)
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dunn_tbl <- tryCatch({
    dunn_raw <- FSA::dunnTest(
      stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)),
      data = x,
      method = "bh"
    )$res

    dunn_raw |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        group1 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 1],
        group2 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 2]
      ) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group1" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n1 = n) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group2" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n2 = n) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        panel = panel_name,
        test = "Dunn",
        group1,
        group2,
        n1,
        n2,
        statistic = Z,
        p = P.unadj,
        p_adj = P.adj
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Dunn_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  eff_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    k <- dplyr::n_distinct(x[[group_col]])
    n <- nrow(x)
    eps2 <- ifelse(n > k, (as.numeric(kw$statistic) - k + 1) / (n - k), NA_real_)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = n,
      n2 = k,
      statistic = eps2,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(kw_row, dunn_tbl, eff_row)
}

detect_delim <- function(file_path) {
  first_line <- readLines(file_path, n = 1, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  if (length(first_line) == 0) stop("Empty file: ", file_path)
  n_tab <- stringr::str_count(first_line, "\t")
  n_comma <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ",")
  n_semicolon <- stringr::str_count(first_line, ";")
  delims <- c("\t" = n_tab, "," = n_comma, ";" = n_semicolon)
  names(which.max(delims))
}

read_header <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    n_max = 0,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  ) |> names()
}

read_table_auto <- function(file_path, delim) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = file_path,
    delim = delim,
    col_names = TRUE,
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    na = c("", "NA", "NaN", "NULL"),
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
  )
}

assert_has_cols <- function(df, cols, df_name) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("[%s] missing required columns: %s", df_name, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
}

as_logical_flex <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")  ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n")  ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

map_final_type <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("主导单谱系型", "Dominant single-lineage", "dominant single-lineage") ~ "Dominant single-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("稳定多谱系型", "Stable multi-lineage", "stable multi-lineage")       ~ "Stable multi-lineage",
    x_chr %in% c("未定型", "Undetermined", "undetermined")                             ~ "Undetermined",
    TRUE ~ x_chr
  )
}

normalize_taxon_name <- function(x) {
  x |>
    as.character() |>
    stringr::str_trim() |>
    stringr::str_to_lower() |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("\\s+", " ")
}

support_status_std <- function(x) {
  tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

add_marker_if_missing <- function(df, marker_value) {
  if ("marker" %in% names(df)) {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = dplyr::if_else(is.na(marker) | marker == "", marker_value, as.character(marker)))
  } else {
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(marker = marker_value)
  }
}

ensure_secondary_optional_cols <- function(df) {
  if (!"retained_flag" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df |> dplyr::mutate(retained_flag = TRUE)
  }
  if (!"replicate_support_status" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df |> dplyr::mutate(replicate_support_status = "supported")
  }
  df
}

pick_or_na_integer <- function(df, col_name) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    as.integer(df[[col_name]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_integer_, nrow(df))
  }
}

pick_or_na_numeric <- function(df, col_name) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    as.numeric(df[[col_name]])
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  }
}

safe_row_n_available <- function(df, cols) {
  cols2 <- intersect(cols, names(df))
  if (length(cols2) == 0) {
    rep(0L, nrow(df))
  } else {
    rowSums(!is.na(df[, cols2, drop = FALSE]))
  }
}

safe_row_means <- function(df, cols) {
  cols2 <- intersect(cols, names(df))
  if (length(cols2) == 0) {
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  } else {
    rowMeans(as.data.frame(df[, cols2, drop = FALSE]), na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

# 样本级去重：若 sample_id 重复，保留首条
dedupe_sample_table <- function(df, df_name) {
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(df)) return(df)
  dup_n <- sum(duplicated(df$sample_id))
  if (dup_n > 0) {
    message(sprintf("[%s] duplicate sample_id detected: %d duplicated rows. Keeping first row per sample_id.", df_name, dup_n))
    df <- df |> dplyr::distinct(sample_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }
  df
}

theme_pub <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(color = "black"),
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey90"),
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70"),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

save_pdf <- function(plot_obj, file_path, width = 7, height = 5) {
  tryCatch({
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      device = grDevices::cairo_pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in"
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("cairo_pdf failed, fallback to pdf(): ", conditionMessage(e))
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = file_path,
      plot = plot_obj,
      device = grDevices::pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      useDingbats = FALSE
    )
  })
}

run_nonparam_stats <- function(df, value_col, group_col, panel_name) {
  x <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(.data[[group_col]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(.group = as.character(.data[[group_col]]))

  group_n <- x |>
    dplyr::count(.group, name = "n")

  if (nrow(group_n) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "INSUFFICIENT_GROUPS",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  kw_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = as.numeric(kw$statistic),
      p = as.numeric(kw$p.value),
      p_adj = as.numeric(kw$p.value)
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal-Wallis_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = nrow(x),
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dunn_tbl <- tryCatch({
    dunn_raw <- FSA::dunnTest(
      stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)),
      data = x,
      method = "bh"
    )$res

    dunn_raw |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        group1 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 1],
        group2 = stringr::str_split_fixed(Comparison, " - ", 2)[, 2]
      ) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group1" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n1 = n) |>
      dplyr::left_join(group_n, by = c("group2" = ".group")) |>
      dplyr::rename(n2 = n) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        panel = panel_name,
        test = "Dunn",
        group1,
        group2,
        n1,
        n2,
        statistic = Z,
        p = P.unadj,
        p_adj = P.adj
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Dunn_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  eff_row <- tryCatch({
    kw <- stats::kruskal.test(stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~", group_col)), data = x)
    k <- dplyr::n_distinct(x[[group_col]])
    n <- nrow(x)
    eps2 <- ifelse(n > k, (as.numeric(kw$statistic) - k + 1) / (n - k), NA_real_)
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = n,
      n2 = k,
      statistic = eps2,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    tibble::tibble(
      panel = panel_name,
      test = "Kruskal_epsilon2_FAILED",
      group1 = NA_character_,
      group2 = NA_character_,
      n1 = NA_integer_,
      n2 = NA_integer_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p = NA_real_,
      p_adj = NA_real_
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(kw_row, dunn_tbl, eff_row)
}

required_cols <- list(

  "sample_type_call.tsv"                 = c("sample_id", "final_type")
)

audit_rows <- list()
loaded <- list()

for (fn in required_files) {
  fpath <- file.path(input_dir, fn)
  exists <- file.exists(fpath)
  delim <- if (exists) detect_delim(fpath) else NA_character_
  header <- if (exists) paste(read_header(fpath, delim), collapse = "|") else NA_character_

  audit_rows[[fn]] <- tibble::tibble(
    file_name = fn,
    file_path = fpath,
    exists = exists,
    detected_delimiter = delim,
    header_columns = header
  )

  if (!exists) {
    stop("Required input file not found: ", fpath)
  }

  dat <- read_table_auto(fpath, delim)
  miss <- setdiff(required_cols[[fn]], names(dat))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Input file [%s] missing required columns: %s", fn, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  loaded[[fn]] <- dat
}

Figure 3A：可以保留，而且是当前最稳的一张。

图上 Stable multi-lineage 的 secondary fraction 明显高于 Dominant single-lineage，且分布中心也更高；Undetermined 组虽然有一部分值偏高，但异质性明显更大。这说明多谱系型不只是“多了几个尾部标签”，而是确实带来了更高的 secondary read burden。这个结论和你给 3B 的原始定位是对得上的。


Figure 3C：这是当前主文里最需要谨慎处理的一张。
从图上看，三个组几乎所有点都压在 0 附近，纵轴甚至被压到了 -0.05 ~ 0.05 的非常窄范围，视觉上等于在说：shared_supported_secondary_n 在当前 conservative same_taxon 规则下基本没有区分度。 这和你原本想让 3C 证明的内容——“稳定多谱系型依赖 cross-marker shared support，而非单 marker 偶然尾部信号”——是有张力的。更直白地说，当前结果不支持把 3C 写成正向证据；它更像一个‘保守匹配下 shared support 很稀少’的负结果。
